$comment: Component Manifest (UI_DATA_ARCHITECTURE_PLAN.md §5/§17). One row per UI component on the Portfolio page. `concepts` ids MUST each resolve to a concept in concepts.json (I8, gate: gen-concepts). `empty_state_copy` feeds <DataState> (no-suppress, §17). `tooltip` is a static ≤12-word string (§28.3, grep-coverable for #1/#2). `has_tooltip_fn`=true means a dynamic tooltip_fn lives in tooltipFns.ts (kept to the 2 real data-point charts, §28.5/§28.7). Render state is NOT stored — it derives from the live envelope status.

components.empty_state_copy: Upload a statement to see your portfolio.
components.tooltip: Your total value, gain, return, and data confidence.

field_tooltips.confidence_band: How complete and confident your fund data is.
field_tooltips.xirr: Your return per year, counting when you invested.
field_tooltips.xirr_1y: Your yearly return rate over the recent one-year period.
field_tooltips.pnl: Value minus what you have invested — not a market move.
field_tooltips.cost_value: What you paid, including reinvested payouts.
field_tooltips.wt_avg_days: How long your money has stayed invested, on average.
field_tooltips.invested_line: Cash you've put in, shown separately from cost-basis gain above.

components.compliance_note: financial summary + a data-confidence band; no composite score/verdict (#2/#1)

components.empty_state_copy: Upload your CAS to compare your portfolio with the market.
components.tooltip: Your percent return compared with the Nifty index.
components.compliance_note: educational benchmark comparison — user's own % + public Nifty closes; price-index disclosure rendered (#1/#2/#9)

components.empty_state_copy: Your portfolio health appears once funds load.
components.compliance_note: label from the rule table, not a function of a score (#1)

components.empty_state_copy: Things to review will show up here.
components.compliance_note: non-advisory decision support — review/diversify, never buy/sell (#1)

components.empty_state_copy: Market mood vs your mix appears here.
Your allocation shows once funds load.
components.tooltip: How your money is split across types of funds.

field_tooltips.top_fund: Your largest single fund, by value.
field_tooltips.top_amc: Your biggest fund house, by value.

components.empty_state_copy: Add a goal to track your progress.
Your returns vs the market appear here.
No funds yet — upload a statement to begin.
components.tooltip: Each fund in your portfolio, with value and label.

field_tooltips.band: Our confidence in this fund's reading.
field_tooltips.label: How this fund is tracking, in plain words.
field_tooltips.xirr: Your yearly return on this fund, since you invested.
field_tooltips.today: Today's change in this fund's value.

components.empty_state_copy: Your standout funds appear once data loads.
Funds worth a look will be flagged here.
Overlap between your funds appears here.
components.tooltip: How many of the same stocks two funds share.

components.empty_state_copy: Your diversification band appears here.
components.tooltip: How well your money is spread, shown as a band.

field_tooltips.top_category: The fund type you own the most.

components.empty_state_copy: Your portfolio risk reading appears here.
components.tooltip: How much your funds' prices typically swing (indicative).

field_tooltips.risk_band: Based on your funds' average swing — indicative only.
field_tooltips.volatility: How much your funds' prices typically move each year.
field_tooltips.max_drawdown: Your biggest drop, from a peak to its lowest point.
field_tooltips.recovery: How long your biggest past drop took to bounce back.
field_tooltips.sharpe: Return earned for the total risk taken.
field_tooltips.sortino: Return earned for the downside risk taken.
field_tooltips.rolling_avg: Your funds' average one-year return, blended by size.
field_tooltips.alpha: Return beyond the benchmark — coming soon.
field_tooltips.beta: How much you move with the market — coming soon.

components.empty_state_copy: Your fee burden appears once funds load.
Your fund-house mix appears here.
Key portfolio events will appear here.
Suggestions to review will appear here.
Enter an assumption to see a what-if.
components.compliance_note: illustrative — your assumption, not a DhanRadar prediction; sensitivity strip required (§13)

components.empty_state_copy: Gaps in your mix will appear here.
components.compliance_note: non-advisory — surfaces gaps, never names a fund to buy (#1)

components.empty_state_copy: Plain-language notes appear once data loads.
components.compliance_note: AI prose under the disclosure bundle, no advice, no score (#1/#2)

components.empty_state_copy: Generate a report once your funds load.
